coupon.source_phrase_block: Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. K-12 educators are always admitted for free with school ID. Children 6 and under are admitted free. Pass provides discount code to be used for booking tickets online. Discount code provided in reservation email, or you can reach a librarian at 781-259-8465 (press 3) lincoln@minlib.net to receive code by phone. Timed tickets must be booked online at https://www.mfa.org/tickets. ***When you reach the page for the date you have already chosen and "General Admission" at the top, you will find a PROMO CODE box at the top on the right. Type in the Promo Code, and Submit, to see the Library Pass options appear. Proof of COVID-19 vaccination to enter the Museum is no longer required in accordance with the City of Boston’s mandate. Please visit the page her
